---
title: Contact Information & Credits
---

<br>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="40%"}

**Contact by**: 

- Linkedin: <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jose-alirio-mendoza-mesa-3b3798239/" target="_blank">Jose Mendoza</a>
- Email: jose.alirio.mm@gmail.com

**Related websites:**

- <a href="https://www.sophicol.org/" target="_blank">SoPhIC</a>
- <a href="https://www.dusselier-lab.org/the-team" target="_blank">Dusselier lab</a>
- <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Qt5ZqzgAAAAJ&hl=it" target="_blank">Google scholar</a>

**Credits:**

- **Content Design:** José Alirio Mendoza
- **Web Development:** <a href="mailto:jsmendozap@gmail.com" target="_blank">Juan Mendoza</a>
- **Photography:** <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/thomas-narmon-25958518b/" target="_blank">Thomas Narmon</a>
:::

::: {.column width="10%"}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
<center>
![](media/pubs.jpg){.margin-photo}
</center>
:::
